name: EuiPagination
description: Page navigation control for paginated data sets.
visualDescription: A horizontal row of numbered page buttons with prev (‹) and next (›) arrow buttons on the ends. The active page number has a filled circular or rectangular background. Shows ellipsis (…) when the total page count is large and intermediate pages are collapsed. NOT EuiSteps (pagination is for navigation between data pages, not a sequential workflow indicator).

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

pageCount.description:
The total number of pages.
Pass `0` if total count is unknown.

activePage.description:
The current page using a zero based index.
So if you set the activePage to 1, it will activate the second page.
Pass `-1` for forcing to last page.

onPageClick.description: Click handler that passes back the internally calculated `activePage` index

compressed.description: If true, will only show next/prev arrows and simplified number set.

responsive.description:
Automatically reduces to the `compressed` version on smaller screens.
Remove completely with `false` or provide your own list of responsive breakpoints.
